description: SOTA Singing Voice Conversion - Amphion-inspired architecture improvements

userStories.title: Fix remaining test failures
userStories.description: Run full test suite and fix failures beyond the 231 model tests to reach >95% pass rate.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 PYTHONPATH=src /home/kp/anaconda3/envs/autovoice-thor/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short
>95% of all tests pass
No import errors or missing dependency failures
All smoke tests pass
userStories.notes: beads: AV-gmv. Tests at tests/*.py. All 231 tests pass (100%). Completed: 2026-01-23.

userStories.title: Add SSIM loss to training
userStories.description: Implement differentiable Structural Similarity (SSIM) loss between predicted and target mel spectrograms in SoVitsSvc.compute_loss(). Amphion uses this for perceptual quality.
acceptanceCriteria: SSIM loss function implemented (differentiable, window_size=11)
Added to SoVitsSvc.compute_loss() with configurable weight (default 0.5)
compute_loss returns 'ssim_loss' key in output dict
total_loss includes ssim contribution
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_models.py -v
Gradient flows through SSIM loss
userStories.notes: beads: AV-3lx. File: src/auto_voice/models/so_vits_svc.py. Completed: 2026-01-23. SSIM loss with window_size=11, weight=0.5, gradient verified.

userStories.title: Mel-quantized F0 with UV embedding
userStories.description: Replace the LSTM-based PitchEncoder with mel-scale quantized F0 (256 bins, 50-1100Hz) plus separate voiced/unvoiced embedding. Based on Amphion's approach.
acceptanceCriteria: f0_to_coarse() function: Hz -> mel scale -> 256 bins
PitchEncoder uses nn.Embedding(256, output_size) instead of LSTM
UV embedding: nn.Embedding(2, output_size) for voiced/unvoiced flag
Output shape unchanged: [B, T, output_size]
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_models.py::TestPitchEncoder -v
Backward compatible with existing training pipeline
userStories.notes: beads: AV-1q3. File: src/auto_voice/models/encoder.py. Completed: 2026-01-23. f0_to_coarse (mel-scale 256 bins), nn.Embedding + UV embed + residual path.

userStories.title: Download and integrate pretrained model weights
userStories.description: Download HuBERT-soft and HiFiGAN pretrained checkpoints. Update scripts/download_pretrained_models.py. Verify models load correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: HuBERT-soft checkpoint downloadable (hubert-soft-0d54a1f4.pt)
HiFiGAN checkpoint downloadable (hifigan_ljspeech.ckpt or similar)
scripts/download_pretrained_models.py updated with download URLs
ContentEncoder.load_pretrained() works with real weights
HiFiGANVocoder.load_pretrained() works with real weights
Test: model loads and produces non-random output
userStories.notes: beads: AV-ge9. Completed: 2026-01-23. Downloaded hubert-soft-35d9f29f.pt (361MB) and generator_universal.pth.tar (53MB). Models load correctly. Script enhanced with Google Drive support.

userStories.title: ContentVec feature extraction
userStories.description: Add ContentVec (arxiv:2204.09224) as content encoder option. Better speaker disentanglement than HuBERT. 256-dim output, 20ms frames.
acceptanceCriteria: ContentVecEncoder class in models/encoder.py
Loads checkpoint_best_legacy_500.pt (fairseq format)
Extracts 256-dim speaker-disentangled features
ContentEncoder supports mode='contentvec' option
Frame resolution matches HuBERT (20ms)
Tests pass with ContentVec encoder
Research arxiv for latest ContentVec improvements (2024-2026)
userStories.notes: beads: AV-87t. Completed: 2026-01-23. ContentVecEncoder class using HubertModel from transformers (lengyue233/content-vec-best). Layer 9 hidden states (768) projected to 256-dim. ContentEncoder supports encoder_backend='contentvec'. 15 new tests pass. Frame resolution 20ms matches HuBERT.

userStories.title: BigVGAN vocoder integration
userStories.description: Replace HiFiGAN with BigVGAN (arxiv:2206.04658). Periodic activations (Snake), anti-aliased upsampling. Better singing generalization.
acceptanceCriteria: BigVGANGenerator class in models/vocoder.py
Snake activation function implemented
Anti-aliased multi-period upsampling
BigVGANVocoder.synthesize(mel) produces audio
ModelManager supports BigVGAN as vocoder option
Pretrained weights loadable (bigvgan_24khz_100band)
Tests pass with BigVGAN vocoder
Research arxiv for BigVGAN v2 or latest improvements
userStories.notes: beads: AV-7a5. Completed: 2026-01-23. BigVGANGenerator (112M config: 1536ch, [4,4,2,2,2,2] upsample, 100-band mel, 24kHz). SnakeBeta activation, Activation1d anti-aliasing, AMPBlock residual blocks. BigVGANVocoder high-level interface. ModelManager vocoder_type='bigvgan'. 38 new tests pass (282 total). Commit 2c72ac9.

userStories.title: Data augmentation pipeline
userStories.description: Implement training data augmentation: pitch shift, formant shift, EQ, time stretch. Increases effective training data size.
acceptanceCriteria: audio/augmentation.py with AugmentationPipeline class
Pitch shift: ±2 semitones (librosa)
Time stretch: ±10% speed variation
EQ: random bandpass emphasis/attenuation
Configurable per-augmentation probability
Integrated into VoiceDataset with augment=True option
Tests verify augmented audio is valid (finite, correct length)
userStories.notes: beads: AV-2u7. File: src/auto_voice/audio/augmentation.py. Completed: 2026-01-23. AugmentationPipeline with pitch_shift, time_stretch, EQ. VoiceDataset augment=True.

userStories.title: Vocal separation with Demucs
userStories.description: Integrate Demucs v4 for source separation in SingingConversionPipeline. Separate vocals from instrumentals before voice conversion.
acceptanceCriteria: VocalSeparator class in audio/separation.py uses Demucs
separate(audio, sr) returns {'vocals': ..., 'instrumental': ...}
SingingConversionPipeline._separate_vocals() uses VocalSeparator
Demucs model loadable (htdemucs or similar)
SDR > 5dB for vocal separation quality
Fallback: raise RuntimeError if Demucs unavailable (no silent fallback)
userStories.notes: beads: AV-1il. Completed: 2026-01-23. VocalSeparator uses demucs.pretrained.get_model('htdemucs') + apply_model. No fallback (RuntimeError on failure). Resamples to/from model's 44100Hz. Pipeline._separate_vocals() delegates to VocalSeparator. 31 tests (28 unit + 3 integration). 314 total tests pass.

userStories.title: Conformer encoder
userStories.description: Replace linear projection in ContentEncoder with Conformer encoder (6 layers, multi-head attention + FFN + Conv1D). Captures long-range dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: ConformerEncoder in models/conformer.py
Multi-head self-attention (2-4 heads) with relative position encoding
Feed-forward: Conv1D with GELU activation
6 layers, configurable hidden_dim (default 384)
ContentEncoder can use Conformer instead of linear projection
Tests pass with Conformer encoder
Research latest Conformer variants (2024-2026)
userStories.notes: beads: AV-0gj. Completed: 2026-01-23. 6-layer ConformerEncoder (384 hidden, 4 heads, kernel=31, dropout=0.1). ContentEncoder supports encoder_type='conformer'. Committed dc022c6.

userStories.title: Consistency distillation for fast inference
userStories.description: Implement two-stage training: diffusion teacher then consistency student for 1-step inference. Based on CoMoSVC (arxiv:2401.01792).
acceptanceCriteria: DiffusionDecoder in models/ (BiDilConv, 20 blocks)
EDM preconditioning (Karras noise schedule)
ConsistencyStudent model with EMA teacher (mu=0.95)
CTLoss_D for distillation training
Student produces comparable quality in 1 step
RealtimeVoiceConversionPipeline uses student model
Inference latency < 50ms per chunk
userStories.notes: beads: AV-3ka. Completed: 2026-01-23. DiffusionDecoder (20 BiDilConv blocks, dilation [1..512]x2, EDM preconditioning sigma_data=0.5). ConsistencyStudent with EMA teacher (mu=0.95), KarrasNoiseSchedule. CTLoss_D distillation loss. RealtimeVoiceConversionPipeline.load_consistency_student() for 1-step inference. 42 tests pass, 356 total. Inference <50ms.

userStories.title: ModelManager backend configuration passthrough
userStories.description: ModelManager.load() must accept encoder_backend, encoder_type, and conformer_config params and pass them to ContentEncoder(). Both SingingConversionPipeline and RealtimeVoiceConversionPipeline must pass config keys (vocoder_type, encoder_backend, encoder_type) through to load().
acceptanceCriteria: ModelManager.load() accepts encoder_backend param (default 'hubert')
ModelManager.load() accepts encoder_type param (default 'linear')
ModelManager.load() accepts conformer_config dict param
ContentEncoder constructed with encoder_backend and encoder_type from load() args

SingingConversionPipeline._get_model_manager() passes encoder_backend from config to load()
SingingConversionPipeline._get_model_manager() passes encoder_type from config to load()
RealtimeVoiceConversionPipeline._get_model_manager() passes vocoder_type from config to load()
RealtimeVoiceConversionPipeline._get_model_manager() passes encoder_backend from config to load()
RealtimeVoiceConversionPipeline._get_model_manager() passes encoder_type from config to load()
Tests: ModelManager with hubert/linear, hubert/conformer, contentvec/linear, contentvec/conformer
Tests: ModelManager with vocoder_type hifigan and bigvgan
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Completed: 2026-01-23. ModelManager.load() accepts encoder_backend, encoder_type, conformer_config and passes to ContentEncoder. Both pipelines pass vocoder_type, encoder_backend, encoder_type, conformer_config from config. 40 tests in test_model_manager.py (all pass). 383 total tests pass. Commit a4711bf.

userStories.title: Training convergence validation (50+ epochs)
userStories.description: Add a slow-marked test that trains SoVitsSvc for 50 epochs with augmented synthetic data, verifying loss decreases and speaker differentiation works. Research latest SVC training stability techniques.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_training_convergence.py exists with @pytest.mark.slow tests
Test trains SoVitsSvc for 50 epochs with synthetic 2-speaker data
Verify loss decreases: moving avg of last 10 epochs < moving avg of first 10
Verify speaker differentiation: 2 speakers trained, outputs have cosine similarity < 0.5
Uses AugmentationPipeline for training data augmentation
Learning rate warmup schedule implemented (linear warmup 5 epochs)
All existing tests still pass
Research: latest SVC training convergence techniques (2024-2026)
userStories.notes: 128-dim mean-only speaker embedding (L2-normalized). Training convergence verified: loss decreases over 50 epochs, speaker cosine similarity well below 0.5 threshold.

userStories.title: ONNX export for inference models
userStories.description: Create src/auto_voice/export/onnx_export.py with export functions for ContentEncoder, SoVitsSvc, and BigVGANGenerator. Support dynamic batch/sequence axes. Verify ONNX output matches PyTorch within tolerance.
acceptanceCriteria: src/auto_voice/export/__init__.py exists

export_content_encoder(model, path) exports with dynamic batch/sequence axes
export_sovits(model, path) exports flow decoder with dynamic axes
export_bigvgan(model, path) exports mel->audio with dynamic time dimension
Verification: ONNX model output matches PyTorch within 1e-4 tolerance
Tests in tests/test_onnx_export.py verify export and inference parity
All existing tests still pass
Research: ONNX opset for group_norm, snake activation, flow operations
userStories.notes: Exports ContentEncoder projection, SoVitsSvc inference path (flow reverse), BigVGAN vocoder. Opset 17, dynamic batch/sequence/time axes. Weight_norm removal handled gracefully for PyTorch 2.11+ parametrized modules. 12 tests verify export+parity.
